## Word submission

**English meaning(s):**
<!-- Comma-separated list of meanings -->

**Part of speech:**
<!-- noun / verb / adjective / adverb / pronoun / phrase / particle -->

**Definition:**
<!-- A full sentence describing the word's meaning and cultural context -->

**Example sentence (Māori):**

**Example sentence (English):**

**Category/categories:**
<!-- e.g. common, emotions, nature, whanau, values, waka-ama, kura -->

**Source:**
<!-- e.g. Te Aka, personal knowledge, kura kaupapa Māori, iwi rūnanga -->

**Submitted by (optional):**

**Iwi / hapū (optional):**
